content.speakerText: What’s something you’ve been getting into lately?
expectedAnswers: I’ve been learning to knit—I made a scarf for my sister last week!
I started journaling every morning. It’s helped me feel more grounded.
I’ve been trying out yoga. I even joined a class on Saturdays now.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达新近培养的兴趣
语言准确性：是否正确使用‘get into’或‘start/try out’等表达新兴趣的结构
表达自然度：是否包含时间细节（last week, every morning, now）增强真实感
关键词覆盖：是否使用兴趣类动词（learning, journaling, trying out）

content.scenarioHint: 你在社交活动中遇到一位新认识的人，想通过兴趣爱好开启深入对话，寻找共同点。
content.speakerText: What’s something you look forward to doing in your free time?
content.speakerTextCn: 你平时空闲时最期待做什么？
expectedAnswers: I love cooking new recipes—last week I tried making Thai curry for the first time!
I’m into photography—I’ve been taking weekend walks just to capture sunsets.
I play guitar on weekends. Not professionally, but it’s my way to chill.
I’ve been getting into yoga—it’s changed how I handle stress.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否通过具体活动表达了个人兴趣
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、真实的表达方式
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'free time', 'do', 或类似兴趣表达

content.scenarioHint: 你和同事在茶水间闲聊，想发现彼此的共同兴趣，建立更轻松的关系。
content.speakerText: Do you have any hobbies you’ve picked up recently?
content.speakerTextCn: 你最近有没有开始什么新爱好？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I started journaling—it’s weirdly calming!
I’ve been learning to bake sourdough bread. It’s messy but fun.
I joined a book club last month. We read one book every two weeks.
I’ve been trying rock climbing—surprisingly addictive!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确提及新近培养的兴趣
语言准确性：是否正确使用现在完成时和口语表达
表达自然度：是否包含情感色彩词如 'weirdly', 'addictive', 'fun'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'hobby', 'recently', 'picked up' 等关键词
